## Why this resource is on the list

This guide is useful because it translates much of the course into a concrete
Norwegian organizational context: scoping, roles, data, legal constraints,
quality assurance, and operating model. It works well as a bridge from hands-on
course use to follow-on work inside participants' own organizations.

::: {.teacher-only}
Ask participants to read the sections on scoping, competence, and legal
conditions before finalizing their project plan.
:::
